task_completion.description: Locate the 'greenhouse_temp' input under the 'environment' node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Emoncms 'Inputs' page is visible, showing the node 'environment' and the input 'greenhouse_temp' selected for configuration.

task_completion.description: Configure the pipeline to log the raw temperature to 'greenhouse_temp_raw'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Input processing configuration list for 'greenhouse_temp' shows a 'Log to feed' process directed to a newly created feed named 'greenhouse_temp_raw' (Engine: PHPFina, Interval: 10s).

task_completion.description: Configure the pipeline to log the daily maximum to 'greenhouse_temp_max'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Input processing configuration list shows a 'Max Daily' process directed to a feed named 'greenhouse_temp_max' (Engine: PHPFina, Interval: 10s).

task_completion.description: Ensure the pipeline resets the value to the raw temperature before calculating the next metric.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Input processing configuration list shows a 'Reset to Original' process placed immediately after the first daily calculation (either max or min). This ensures the subsequent calculation uses the raw input temperature rather than the output of the previous process.

task_completion.description: Configure the pipeline to log the daily minimum to 'greenhouse_temp_min'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Input processing configuration list shows a 'Min Daily' process directed to a feed named 'greenhouse_temp_min' (Engine: PHPFina, Interval: 10s).

integrity.description: The agent used the Emoncms web interface to configure the inputs and feeds.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Emoncms web UI (browser window, Emoncms menus, input configuration modals) rather than terminal commands or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the evaluation or data generation scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening or editing 'verifier.py' or any synthetic data python scripts in a text editor or IDE.

integrity.description: The feeds were genuinely created within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The feeds appear in the Emoncms UI dropdowns or on the Feeds page, confirming they were registered in the system and not just typed as plain text outside the application's configuration forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input to configure: 'greenhouse_temp' (Node: 'environment'). Required feeds: 'greenhouse_temp_raw', 'greenhouse_temp_max', 'greenhouse_temp_min'. All feeds must use the PHPFina engine (Engine ID 5) with a 10s interval. To satisfy the requirement that both max and min are calculated from the raw value, the Emoncms process list MUST include a 'Reset to Original' process between the daily max and daily min processes. Without this, the second calculation would incorrectly use the output of the first calculation.
